free_text: Isotopic and neutron yields of products from the

Beryllium degraders used to obtain lower energies.
Isotopically pure 233UO(2) mixed with copper oxide and
placed in central region of thin-walled aluminum can.
Gamma spectra analyzed using code GAMANAL.
Decay curves analyzed using code CLSQ.
This half-life is probably a typo in the article
(actual half-life is 6.47 days. Commment by compiler)
Errors given are square root of the sum of
the squares of all known systematic and random errors.
